meta.name: IEPA Country Scores Dataset
meta.description: Historical scores (2020-2024) for Tier 1 emerging markets across IEPA-mapped indices. Sources include World Bank API, IMF WEO, UNDP, Transparency International, IEP, SDSN, Heritage Foundation, Portulans Institute, WIPO, and others.
meta.coverage_note: ~50 of 163 indices have live data. Remaining indices require paid data access (Bloomberg, PitchBook, fDi Intelligence, etc.) or are qualitative frameworks.
